title: count_tokens forwarding + live 50MB gateway body limit

tests.summary: full lane green at 4813886 (incl. new count-tokens 7 + body-limit 5 + contract 2); fix delta dad8e9f verified by the 34-test affected suites + typecheck

build.summary: green (shared rebuilt for the new descriptors; api dist rebuilt before evidence)

evidence: reviewer ran typecheck + 8 suites + chokepoint grep + live probes itself (incl. a case-variant 2MB probe and a >50MB 413 probe)
findings: [Low F1, FIXED dad8e9f] parser-skip predicate case-sensitive while Express routing is not - /API/v1/llm still hit the global 1mb parser (CONV-2 on the Anthropic surface)
[Low F2, FIXED] 413-branch and vault-cleared clauses had no committed pins - both added
[nit F3, FIXED] fast-clamp drops logged as unexpected
[Medium, FIXED dad8e9f] bare startsWith parser exemption also exempted /api/v1/llmfoo -> exact-subtree + case-insensitive predicate
[Low, FIXED] error handler shaped ANY 4xx-status error -> gated on the body-parser signature (string type + 4xx status)

video.evidence: asciinema live demo vs real gatewayRouter: count_tokens 200 {input_tokens:1234} via endpoint selector, wire model family-resolved, stream/max_tokens dropped, deny-listed party TOKENIZED on the wire, zero token_events, billing-blocked owner counts (200) while real message 402s, malformed JSON answers Anthropic-shaped 400. Every beat machine-asserted against the cast text.

notes: Carried finding closed: the S1-review dead-50MB-limit defect fixed here (global parser skips /api/v1/llm, gateway parses its own bodies, Anthropic-shaped parse errors).
Fresh-review residual documented in security.md: uncapped count_tokens allows uncapped short-lived vault allocation via client session_ids (TTL-swept, tiny).
